sizing_rule.note: Parametric optimal f calculation using normal distribution with lower bound of -4 sigma and upper bound of +6.94 sigma, sampled across 300 equally spaced data points. This establishes the mathematically optimal fraction of capital to risk per trade.

source_rule_text: Determine parametric optimal f using bounding parameters of -4 and +6.94 sigmas with 300 equally spaced data points to establish position sizing parameters
